records.description: Config file has missing section or parsing error — ensure config file exists with required sections

reproduction.command: echo 'no_section_key = val' > /tmp/_polaris_repro_cfg.ini && python3 -c "import configparser; c=configparser.ConfigParser(); c.read('/tmp/_polaris_repro_cfg.ini'); c.get('database','host')" 2>&1 || true
reproduction.fix_command: printf '[database]\nhost = localhost\n' > /tmp/_polaris_repro_cfg.ini && python3 -c "import configparser; c=configparser.ConfigParser(); c.read('/tmp/_polaris_repro_cfg.ini'); print(c.get('database','host'))" 2>&1 || true

records.description: TOML config file has invalid syntax — check file for syntax errors
